sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal-f method: position size f derived from geometric mean of HPRs across ±3SD price scenarios. G(f,T) = [∏HPR(u)]^(1/∑P(u)). Optimal f maximizes geometric growth across repeated identical scenario sets.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by multiplying all Holding Period Returns (HPRs) across possible price scenarios and raising to the power of 1 divided by sum of probabilities to obtain the geometric mean, which guides the optimal fraction f to invest.
